creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Romain Tartiere from comment #3)
> (In reply to Baptiste Daroussin from comment #2)
> Thank you for the feedback @bapt.  @madpilot, I close this PR for now since
> the problem should not occur with a fresh HEAD.
> 
> If the problem come back, we will see the options and act accordingly.

Thanks to both of you for your work and feedback. I agree with closing this, since things are already going in the right direction.
